docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE & REQUEST FOR RESET OF COURT DATE. [SUBMITTED ON REUEST TO POSTPONE SC-150 FORM] FILED BY PLAINTIFF WOMELSDORF, LEAH

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-06-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-06-2023 BY JUDGE PANG LY. PLAINTIFF LEAH WOMELSDORF IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHERYL FUNG IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. DEFENDANT CHERYL FUNG WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WOMELSDORF, LEAH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FUNG, CHERYL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
TRIAL RESET TO FEB-06-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF DEC-02-2022 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-06-2023 - JUDGMENT.

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00); REMARKS: ATTEMPTS MADE TO NO AVAIL. NO RESPONSE TO NOTICES LEFT AT THE ADDRESS PROVIDED. FILED BY PLAINTIFF WOMELSDORF, LEAH AS TO DEFENDANT FUNG, CHERYL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,200.00 FILED BY WOMELSDORF, LEAH AS TO DEFENDANT FUNG, CHERYL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-02-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY WOMELSDORF, LEAH FUNG, CHERYL
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WOMELSDORF, LEAH AS TO DEFENDANT FUNG, CHERYL
